response.justification: Despite extensive experience, the candidate is overqualified and misaligned with the junior/mid-level role, with a career spanning 15+ years in senior and staff roles across diverse domains; their focus on DLang, embedded systems, and AI-agent infrastructure diverges from the job’s core stack (TypeScript, React, Nest.js, PostgreSQL), and their German language proficiency is only basic despite high on-site requirements in Berlin.
strengths: Extensive TypeScript and Node.js experience across multiple production systems
Strong full-stack exposure including React, REST APIs, and database integration
Proven ability to lead and contribute to complex, scalable architectures
concerns: Far exceeds seniority level — overqualified for junior/mid role
Primary tech stack (DLang, embedded) mismatches core requirements (Nest.js, PostgreSQL)
Basic German proficiency conflicts with high on-site presence requirement
